products.title: Sunwhite Calrose White Rice, 2kg
products.description:
About Sunwhite:
Sunwhite is proudly owned by SunRice in Australia. SunRice is a global food business and one of Australia’s branded food exporters.

Sunwhite is one of the world's branded rice food companies, supplying high quality and innovative rice food products in the Middle East.

Our proud history dates back to the establishment of a single rice mill in the Riverina region of New South Wales in 1950. Today, SunRice is a vertically integrated business, operating across the entire value chain, including state-of- the-art processing, packing and value adding food plants, as well as an animal feeds division, a dedicated rice research company and a sophisticated local grain storage network.

Innovation is the key to our success and our brands are recognized for their superior taste quality.

Product description:
Sunwhite Calrose Rice is a high-quality, medium-grain rice variety known for its excellent taste and versatility in various culinary preparations. Grown with care and expertise, this rice has a tender texture and absorbs flavors well, making it a popular choice for a wide range of dishes. Whether you're cooking savory stir-fries, delicious sushi or flavorful rice bowls, Sunwhite Calrose Rice provides a delicious and satisfying foundation for your meals.

Safety Information:
Store in a cool, dry and hygienic place

Directions:
Store in a cool, dry and hygienic place

products.title: Tilda Brown Basmati Rice With Steamed Quinoa 250g
products.description:
Product Description:
Delight your taste buds with the Tilda Brown Basmati Rice coupled with Steamed Quinoa 250g - a perfect blend of the classic aromatic Basmati rice and nutrient-dense Quinoa. This healthy and delicious combo is pre-steamed and lightly seasoned, offering you the joy of exotic grains that are high in fiber and protein - all in just one pack! Naturally gluten-free and vegan-friendly, this product is easy to cook and perfect for putting together a healthy meal in no time.

How to Use:
1. Tear open the top corner of the pack slightly to let out the steam.
2. Heat in the microwave for 2 minutes on full power (800W). Time may vary slightly depending on your microwave's power.
3. Remove the pouch from the microwave carefully - it will be hot. 
4. Tear open the pack completely, fluff with a fork and it's ready to serve.

Storage Instructions:
1. Store the unopened pack in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
2. Once opened, refrigerate the leftover product in an airtight container.
3. Consume within 48 hours of opening for maintaining freshness and optimal taste.

Ingredients:
1. Steamed Brown Basmati Rice (80%)
2. Steamed Quinoa (20%)
3. Vegetable Oil (Sunflower/Rapeseed)
4. Sea Salt

products.description:
Product Description:
Feast your taste buds on the Veres Pickled Cherry Tomatoes, a 500g jar filled with high-quality, pickled cherry tomatoes. Each jar contains whole, crunchy, and vibrant cherry tomatoes, preserved in a deliciously tangy and mildly sweet brine. Prepared from the best natural ingredients and without any artificial preservatives, Veres Pickled Cherry Tomatoes are a delectable delight perfect for your culinary explorations, bringing a rich burst of flavor to every bite.

How to Use:
1. Open the jar by twisting the lid anticlockwise.
2. Use a clean fork or spoon to take out the desired quantity of pickled tomatoes. 
3. Add them to your salads, pastas, pizzas, sandwiches, or use as a gourmet accompaniment to cheese platters.
4. When using as a topping or garnish, place the pickled tomatoes directly on top of your prepared dish.
5. Once done, ensure to close the jar tightly to maintain freshness.

Storage Instructions:
1. Store the unopened Veres Pickled Cherry Tomatoes in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
2. Once opened, ensure to keep it refrigerated and consume within four weeks.
3. Always use a clean and dry utensil for extraction to avoid adulteration.

Ingredients:
- Cherry Tomatoes
- Vinegar
- Sugar
- Salt
- Dill
- Garlic

- Allspice
- Black Pepper
- Red Chili

products.title: Fine Fluffy Facial 2Ply Tissue, 10x20 Sheets
products.description:
Product Description:
Your search for softness ends here with our Fine Fluffy Facial 2Ply Tissue. This pack comes with 10 boxes, each containing 20 sheets – a total of 200 sheets for undisturbed usage. Each sheet is thoughtfully made with 2-ply thickness to provide an extra layer of comfort and strength. Its fine, fluffy, and smooth texture makes for a soft touch against your skin, reducing the risk of irritation during use. They are not only perfect for facial use, but also versatile enough to use for makeup removal, or dealing with occasional spills and splashes. 

How to Use:
1. Open the tissue box by gently removing the perforated opening on the top.
2. Pull out a single tissue from the box, letting the next one pop up and be ready for future use.
3. Use the tissue gently on your face or any area desired.
4. After usage, dispose of the tissue responsibly in a waste bin. It is single-use only and not meant for flushing.

Storage Instructions:
1. Store the tissue box in a clean, dry place to avoid contamination. 
2. Keep it away from direct sunlight and extreme temperatures which can damage the tissues.
3. To maintain the fluffiness and prevent absorbing moisture, avoid storing in damp places like bathrooms.

Materials:
1. Made with Virgin Pulp: Ensures softness and superior strength.
2. Hygienic and Free from Harmful Chemicals: The tissues are produced in a hygienic environment and are devoid of any harmful chemicals.
3. Hypoallergenic: Perfect for sensitive skin, these tissues have been dermatologically safety tested to prevent skin irritation. 

Indulge in a touch of luxury and comfort with our Fine Fluffy Facial 2Ply Tissue- because your skin deserves the best!

products.title: Dove Go Fresh Cucumber & Green Tea Scent Deodorant Spray, 150ml
products.description:
Your delicate underarm skin deserves the same care you give the rest of your body. Dove Antiperspirant Deodorant Spray with Cucumber and Green Tea and moisturising cream gives long-lasting freshness, gentle underarm care, and superior odor protection day and night. When you use your deodorant, you want freshness that lasts with natural refreshing ingredients. This long-lasting 48-hour deodorant for women protects against odor no matter what the day brings. That's not all – enriched with ¼ moisturizers, this deodorant spray also cares for your skin while it protects against odor. Reliable long-lasting freshness will leave you feeling confident and clean – all day long. Infused with cucumber and green tea scent, this deodorant spray gives superior 48h odor protection with every application. Just gently spray Dove deodorant spray under each arm to ensure you've covered the area completely. For the most effective underarm care, avoid applying directly after shaving. With effective odor protection, the fresh scent of this deodorant will leave you feeling fresher for longer. Suitable for all skin types even sensitive skin. Dove believes no young person should be held back from reaching their full potential. Since 2004, Dove has been building self-esteem and confidence in young people – and by 2030, it will have helped a quarter of a billion young people through educational programmes and resources. Have a go at using this deodorant spray on whenever you need a top-up of freshness. It's small enough to carry with you wherever you go and its refreshing, subtle scent means it's perfect for after work, after the gym, or just before you leave the house. So with all those soothing ingredients combined with dryness protection that lasts, what better way is there to start each day? Globally, Dove does not test deodorant on animals. For the last 30 years, Dove has used alternative non-animal methods to test the safety of its products.

How to Use: 
- Ensure your underarms are dry before application.
- Hold the Dove Go Fresh Deodorant Spray approximately 15cm from your underarm.
- Compress the spray nozzle for about two seconds for ample coverage.
- Allow a moment for the spray to dry before dressing.
- Use daily for best results.

products.title: Dove Go Fresh Body Wash with Cucumber & Green Tea, 500ml
products.description:
Dove Refreshing body wash provides instant softness and lasting care for your skin. Keeping our skin looking healthy helps us feel confident, inside and out – and finding the right moisturising body wash is a great place to start. With the rich, creamy lather and delicate fragrance of Dove Deep nourishing and moisturising shower gel, you can transform every shower into a caring skin care ritual. Our Sulfate-free, microbiome-gentle, paraben free body wash with a fresh fragrance provides the skin softness we are all looking for. Made with 100% gentle cleansers, Dove Refreshing Body Wash is gentle to the skin’s microbiome, its living protective layer. It creates a rich lather that moisturises and replenishes skin while also leaving it to cleanse, revived, and refreshed. With naturally derived cleansers and skin-natural nutrients, we care about what goes into our body wash. Dove sulfate-free body wash is the #1 dermatologist recommended and microbiome gentle. Dove care goes further than moisturising body wash with PETA Cruelty-Free certification and 100% recycled plastic bottles.

How to Use: 
1. Wet your body completely under the shower.
2. Pour some Dove Cucumber & Green Tea Body Wash onto your hand or a shower puff.
3. Rub your hands together until the wash starts to lather, or use a shower puff to create a rich, creamy foam.
4. Apply all over your body, paying special attention to any dry areas.
5. Rinse off thoroughly with warm water.
6. Pat yourself dry and follow with your favorite Dove moisturizer for an enhancing moisturizing experience.

Your search for softness ends here with our Fine Fluffy Facial 2Ply Tissue. This pack comes with 10 boxes, each containing 20 sheets – a total of 200 sheets for undisturbed usage. They are not only perfect for facial use, but also versatile enough to use for makeup removal, or dealing with occasional spills and splashes. 

How to Use:
1. Open the tissue box by gently removing the perforated opening on the top.
2. Pull out a single tissue from the box, letting the next one pop up and be ready for future use.
3. Use the tissue gently on your face or any area desired.
4. After usage, dispose of the tissue responsibly in a waste bin. It is single-use only and not meant for flushing.

Storage Instructions:
1. Store the tissue box in a clean, dry place to avoid contamination. 
2. Keep it away from direct sunlight and extreme temperatures which can damage the tissues.
3. To maintain the fluffiness and prevent absorbing moisture, avoid storing in damp places like bathrooms.

Materials:
1. Made with Virgin Pulp: Ensures softness and superior strength.
2. Hygienic and Free from Harmful Chemicals: The tissues are produced in a hygienic environment and are devoid of any harmful chemicals.

products.title: Zott Mixed Fruit Flavored Yoghurt, 115g
products.description:
Product Description:
Indulge your senses with every spoonful of Zott Mixed Fruit Flavored Yoghurt. This premium yoghurt weighing 115g is packed with the tangy punch of various fruits, bringing a harmonious blend of flavors that is sure to satisfy your taste buds. Nestled underneath a layer of creamy, wholesome yoghurt, you'll discover bountiful chunks of apples, strawberries, kiwis, and other seasonal fruits delivering an irresistibly refreshing taste. A perfect combination of health and pleasure, this yoghurt offers richness in essential nutrients, making it an ideal snack for every generation. 

How to Use:
1. Remove the yoghurt from the fridge prior to consumption.
2. Peel back the foil lid carefully.
3. Mix the yoghurt well with a spoon to evenly distribute the fruit content before eating.
4. Dig in and enjoy straight from the pot, or pour it on granola, muesli or any other breakfast aka your bowl of goodness, and relish the taste.
5. If you can't finish it all at once, replace the foil lid and refrigerate. Consume within a day of opening.

Storage Instructions:
1. Store the Zott Mixed Fruit Flavored Yoghurt in a refrigerator below 5°C.
2. The yoghurt should not be frozen or stored at room temperature for too long, as it may impact the product's quality.
3. Consume the yoghurt within the expiry date mentioned on the packaging to ensure its freshness.

Ingredients:
1. Cultured Pasteurized Milk
2. Sugar
3. Fresh Mixed Fruit Puree (contains apple, strawberry, kiwi, and other seasonal fruits)
4. Natural Colors
5. Stabilizers
6. Live Yoghurt Cultures.

How to Use:
• Step 1: Fill a large pot with water, place over a high heat and add a tablespoon of salt. We recommend 1 ltr of water for 100 g Pasta. 
• Step 2: When the water starts to boil, add your pasta. 
• Step 3: Boil for 11 min stirring occasionally. For a more tender pasta, cook for 1-2 additional min. 
• Step 4: Drain well and finish cooking in the pan with your favourite Barilla Pasta sauce. CHEF TIP: For a better result, heat up the sauce in a pan and toss it together with the pasta.

products.title: Fine Fluffy Facial 2Ply Tissue, 10x20 Sheets
products.description:
Product Description:
Your search for softness ends here with our Fine Fluffy Facial 2Ply Tissue. This pack comes with 10 boxes, each containing 20 sheets – a total of 200 sheets for undisturbed usage. Each sheet is thoughtfully made with 2-ply thickness to provide an extra layer of comfort and strength. Its fine, fluffy, and smooth texture makes for a soft touch against your skin, reducing the risk of irritation during use. They are not only perfect for facial use, but also versatile enough to use for makeup removal, or dealing with occasional spills and splashes. 

How to Use:
1. Open the tissue box by gently removing the perforated opening on the top.
2. Pull out a single tissue from the box, letting the next one pop up and be ready for future use.
3. Use the tissue gently on your face or any area desired.
4. After usage, dispose of the tissue responsibly in a waste bin. It is single-use only and not meant for flushing.

Storage Instructions:
1. Store the tissue box in a clean, dry place to avoid contamination. 
2. Keep it away from direct sunlight and extreme temperatures which can damage the tissues.
3. To maintain the fluffiness and prevent absorbing moisture, avoid storing in damp places like bathrooms.

Materials:
1. Made with Virgin Pulp: Ensures softness and superior strength.
2. Hygienic and Free from Harmful Chemicals: The tissues are produced in a hygienic environment and are devoid of any harmful chemicals.
3. Hypoallergenic: Perfect for sensitive skin, these tissues have been dermatologically safety tested to prevent skin irritation. 

Indulge in a touch of luxury and comfort with our Fine Fluffy Facial 2Ply Tissue- because your skin deserves the best!
